
# Speakers

::: {.speaker-grid}


::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/aaron.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Aaron Wang**    
University of Illinois, Chicago
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/aishik.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Aishik Ghosh**  
Georgia Institute of Technology
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/angira.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Angira Rastogi**    
Lawrence Berkely National Laboratory
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/eddie.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Christopher McGrady**   
University of Notre Dame
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/dennis.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Dennis Noll**   
Stanford University
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/elham.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Elham E Khoda**   
University of British Columbia
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/melissa.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Melissa Quinnan**    
University of California, San Diego
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/roger.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Roger Huang**    
Lawrence Berkely National Laboratory
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/samuel.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Samuel Ferraro**  
Harvard University
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/sofia.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Sofia Schweitzer**    
Rutgers University
:::

::: {.speaker}
![](assets/img/speakers/yifan.jpg){.speaker-img}

**Yifan Chen**     
SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory
:::
